funding_reality_check.note: PCRA proceeds can fund ETF buys in-place; funding individual-stock adds with them requires an operator transfer (explicit operator action).

base_packet.summary: Keep the GOOGL/MSFT rotation live, but today's updated plan reduces the actionable bands and stages deployment until the Fed reaction, market breadth, rates, oil, UW flow, and source review confirm.

facts: Federal Reserve calendar confirms the June 16-17 meeting is SEP-associated, with the June 17 decision still the gating event.
Same-day market/news scan showed mixed indexes before the Fed: Dow/small caps firmer, Nasdaq/AI softer, and Treasury yields slightly higher.
Fundstrat latest research keeps near-term equity trends intact and says tech leadership has not cracked, but also highlights growth-to-value broadening and warns against chasing stretched tech.
Notion Daily Synthesis keeps Middle East oil/rates event risk on top, Social Watch dark, and Research Queue focus on BMNR, GOOGL, and AVGO.
Oil is below the panic trigger in today's news tape, but the repo trigger still watches WTI near 99-101 and 10Y yields near 4.55-4.59.
current_market_update.headline: Mixed pre-FOMC tape and Fundstrat broadening work argue for reduced, staged deployment instead of the full model band before the Fed reaction is known.
current_market_update.implication: Keep the GOOGL/MSFT rotation alive, but reduce today's actionable bands, stage only if amber, and let AVGO become the top secondary swap review rather than a primary pre-Fed add.

deep_discount_research.disconfirmation: Do not add until financing impact, mNAV, ETH-per-share, preferred coverage, and crypto tape resolve.
Needs uranium/HALEU flow and policy confirmation; size is already meaningful.
Deep pullback needs defense order, margin, and flow confirmation before capital competes with GOOGL/MSFT.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict means no promotion without business-quality reversal evidence.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict means discount is research-only until source reconciliation changes.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict and small current exposure make this research-only.
Critical-minerals pullback is not enough while Fundstrat source context remains avoid/bottom-list.
Needs rare-earth policy/order-flow confirmation; discount alone is not a buy signal.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict; crypto/broker beta must confirm before any add review.

do_not_touch_yet: GRNJ remains protected unless explicit thesis break or operator override.
BMNR stays monitor-first until financing/mNAV/ETH-per-share work clears.
LEU/UUUU/MP require critical-minerals and flow checks before any add review.
Options remain review-only with no contract selection.

green: After the Fed statement and press conference, QQQ/SPY hold up and AI/semi tape is not rejecting the move.
Yields and oil are not spiking against duration/growth exposure; 10Y is not moving toward the 4.55-4.59 trigger zone.
UW price/flow fetches are present and not manually interpreted as contradictory.
Current source review does not contradict the staged add.
red: No net-new AI concentration if QQQ/SPY, rates/oil, source review, or same-session flow breaks down after the Fed reaction.
Refresh the packet and review defensive trims/hedges separately.
stage: Pre-Fed or post-Fed tape is mixed, growth-to-value broadening is outpacing mega-cap AI, or UW/source rows remain incomplete.
Use only the deliberately reviewed starter cap; keep the rest staged as tickets, not trades.

higher_quality_pullbacks.disconfirmation: Do not deploy if the laggard thesis remains only valuation-based without post-Fed live confirmation.
Do not deploy if QQQ/SPY, yields, oil, source review, or flow contradict the staged add after the Fed reaction.
Advance only if optical/AI infrastructure evidence and flow beat the base packet.
Advance only if post-Fed semi tape and fresh flow beat GOOGL/MSFT on capital efficiency; prefer swap-funded review before net-new AI.
Advance only if power/cooling flow and entry quality beat the base packet.
Secondary add only if live source review is stronger than the funded GOOGL/MSFT packet.
Already large; pullback is not enough unless target/sizing room and flow support it.

honesty_rule: No trades executed. No option contracts selected. Stale/dark lanes remain visible.

fundstrat.line: Chrome-authenticated latest research review supports staged confirmation: tech trend intact, but broadening/value rotation argues against chasing full mega-cap AI size pre-Fed.

market_timing.line: Mixed pre-FOMC tape and Fundstrat broadening work argue for reduced, staged deployment instead of the full model band before the Fed reaction is known.

AVGO.line: Live AVGO diligence supports a high-quality pullback/swap candidate; move it up only if post-Fed semi tape and flow beat GOOGL/MSFT.

BMNR.line: Live Research Queue keeps BMNR monitor-first until mNAV, ETH-per-share, preferred coverage, and settlement-era price/flow are resolved.

GOOGL.line: Live Research Queue keeps GOOGL staged around the tranche-2 trigger; today's synthesis shows a target gap, but pre-FOMC tape keeps adds reduced and gated.

notion_research_queue.today_daily_synthesis: 2026-06-17 synthesis keeps Middle East oil/rates event risk on top, Social Watch dark, and BMNR/GOOGL/AVGO in live research focus.

social_watch.honesty_rule: Watch-only until independently confirmed; never a standalone trade signal.
social_watch.line: Social watch not checked: no Reddit/social cache supplied.

uw.honesty_rule: Rows prove endpoint fetch status only; neutral rows do not confirm a trade thesis.
uw.line: UW endpoint proof: 13 captured row(s); neutral/inconclusive rows do not promote trades.

preferred_sequence: Before the Fed reaction is known, stage tickets without action or use only the reduced starter cap.
If amber persists after the Fed, favor a smaller GOOGL starter before MSFT; do not force both names.
Elevate AVGO to top secondary swap review only if post-Fed semi tape and flow beat GOOGL/MSFT; FN/VRT/AMZN remain secondary.
